use_cases: Primary navigation bar for web applications with expandable icon menus
Quick access toolbar for frequently used features and actions
Dashboard navigation with dynamic scaling dock icons
Floating icon bar for mobile-first applications
Persistent navigation for single-page applications with smooth animations
ai_summary: A macOS-style animated dock navigation component that dynamically magnifies icons based on mouse proximity. Uses spring-based animations via Framer Motion for smooth, physics-based scaling effects. Features semi-transparent glass styling with rounded corners and subtle shadows, providing an elegant, modern navigation experience for desktop and mobile applications.
